articles.lead_en: Russia’s Foreign Ministry has warned citizens against traveling to Thailand, saying they risk detention or arrest at Washington’s request.
articles.title_raw: Russia’s Foreign Ministry warns citizens against travel to Thailand, citing US ‘special operations to catch Russians’

articles.title_en: The Russian Ambassador took part in the wreath-laying ceremony at the National Pantheon of Venezuela
articles.lead_en: Sergei Melik-Bagdasarov emphasized that the ceremony was another evidence of the traditionally friendly relations between Russia and Venezuela
articles.title_raw: Посол РФ принял участие в церемонии возложения венка в Национальном пантеоне Венесуэлы
articles.lead_raw: Сергей Мелик-Багдасаров подчеркнул, что церемония стала еще одним свидетельством традиционно дружественных отношений между Россией и Венесуэлой
